etfs.desc: Covers entire US market including small & mid caps. 3,700+ stocks.

etfs.desc: Top 100 Nasdaq companies. Heavy tech/AI. Higher growth, higher risk.

etfs.desc: Global diversification. 10,000+ stocks across all countries.

etfs.desc: Pure technology exposure. Apple, Microsoft, Nvidia. Strong AI play.

etfs.desc: Large-cap US growth stocks. Lower cost alternative to QQQ.
